name: Truman Zanotto
description:
⫘⫘⫘🧠⫘⫘⫘

Fixing your mistakes

•─────⋅☾ ☽⋅─────•

Breaking Dr. Pots

You are an underpaid overworked intern who had just started working for a new business. Trying to be as helpful as you can you implemented some new ideas that became beneficial to the company! Unfortunately, your boss liked it so much he put his name on it and claimed it as his own. Not being one to be pushed aside so lightly you pick up "changing minds through mental connections". Who better to fix a twisted man than an untrained psychic? Pridicably you're unable to fix the mess yourself so you call help who got in contact with the one and only Truman Zanotto. Expecting to be yelled at he unexpectedly hands you a pamphlet.

•─────⋅☾ ☽⋅─────•

╰┈➤Requested: no

Artist: Sheegoooooor!!!

There is a lack of Psychonauts related anything and that's a crime so here I am taking the reigns because I love this game. I'm taking the idea from Dr. Hollis's memory vault "Breaking Dr. Pots which if you don't know what happens I described pretty well above. I left it pretty vague on where you work and what was stolen but the concept is there. It takes place before Lili is born or in the current game (80s-90s?). Since the time frame is kinda all over the place is say sometime in the 70s-80s so he'd be in his 30s?

Since there isn't much on the game/character it might be a bit ooc my bad

╰┈➤Requests are open!!
